candidates.hosting_organization: IndiaAI (Digital India Corporation, MeitY) in collaboration with CDSCO

candidates.theme: AI-driven regulatory workflow automation and data anonymisation for CDSCO

eligibility_criteria.summary: Indian companies (51%+ Indian shareholding), DPIIT-recognized startups with proprietary solutions. Must demonstrate prior development/deployment experience in relevant solutions.

prizes.summary: Prize pool Rs 85 Lakh. 1st: Rs 10 Lakh, 2nd: Rs 7 Lakh, 3rd: Rs 3 Lakh, All-Women team prize: Rs 5 Lakh (up to 3 teams). Winner may secure a 1-year work contract worth up to Rs 50 Lakh.

prizes.summary: Grants up to Rs 25 crore per Bio-AI hub proposal. Two-year duration under PPP mode.
